# Hobbit Cloak

> [!tip] 👑 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Leadership

![[141013.png]]

*Item.*

---

Attach to a **_Hobbit_** hero. Limit 1 per hero.
Attached hero gets +2 DEF while defending against an attack by an enemy with an engagement cost higher than your threat.
